_comment: Synthetic fixture mimicking the shape of Google's tbm=map JSON payload AFTER the )]}' XSSI prefix is stripped. Indices below 64 are stubbed to None to keep the file readable; we only populate the offsets the extractor actually reads. Update this fixture when adapting to a new Google response shape and re-run tests/test_extractor_shape.py.
_shape: data is a list of >=65 elements; data[64] is the results array; each entry is [None, <place-list>]; place-list has ~260 slots.
